data.title: [merge-to-main.sh]: sync step pre-commit hooks re-stage files causing uncommitted-changes loop
data.description: During merge-to-main.sh sync phase, pre-commit hooks modify files during the merge commit, leaving them re-staged. On resume, the script sees uncommitted changes and refuses to proceed — creating an unrecoverable loop. Workaround: manual merge on the main repo. Impact: blocked session merge for ~10 minutes.
